name: Ava - scat scenario
description:
!!!!!!SCAT!!!!!!PISS!!!!!
Your friend Ava is in a car with you, you have been travelling for a while and she confesses she really needs to go.
What do you do?

requested!

I am not sure why but for me the bot keeps misbehaving, I think it is mostly because the bots have been odd these days, regardless, I hope you have fun!
